seoTitle: Bedourie vs Beebo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bedourie and Beebo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bedourie and Beebo.
heading: Bedourie vs Beebo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bedourie, Queensland and Beebo, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bedourie has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Beebo (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bedourie or Beebo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bedourie has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Beebo scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bedourie scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Beebo scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bedourie or Beebo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bedourie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
